data.title: Dean Sonderegger appointed as Senior VP and GM of Wolters Kluwer's ELM Solutions with 25+ years experience. Focused on growth and innovation.
data.description: A new Senior Vice President and General Manager has been appointed for Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory's ELM Solutions business. Dean Sonderegger, with over 25 years of experience in legal software, tax, and services industries, will lead the business. Known for his ability to drive growth and transformation, he is expected to propel ELM Solutions towards innovation and expansion. Martin O’Malley, CEO of Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory, expressed confidence in Sonderegger's capabilities for the role.

data.title: Natera partners with NVIDIA to enhance AI models for precision medicine, integrating in vivo datasets and machine learning.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Natera, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTRA), known for cell-free DNA testing and precision medicine, revealed its partnership with NVIDIA to push forward its multimodal AI foundation model platform growth. This venture aims to broaden precision medicine applications. Natera will combine its distinct longitudinal and multi-time point in vivo datasets, along with its exclusive machine learning models, with NVIDIA's high-performance computing resources to enhance the project.

data.title: DDN tops CRN's Cloud 100 list for 2026, recognized as leading AI data platform provider among 100 channel-focused companies.
data.description: In Chatsworth, California, DDN, a top AI data platform provider, was recently acknowledged on CRN's 2026 Cloud 100 list. This list identifies the top 100 cloud companies in various categories like cloud infrastructure, monitoring, security, software, and storage. CRN's Cloud 100 honors companies that are dedicated to backing channel partners. DDN's recognition reflects its standing in the competitive cloud industry.

data.title: ISG initiates studies on private, hybrid cloud services & solutions for data-intensive & AI-led workloads. #ISG #cloud
data.description: A study has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Connecticut, focusing on providers of private and hybrid cloud data center services tailored for data-intensive and AI-driven tasks. This investigation will analyze various companies operating in this sector to identify key trends and innovations. The city of Stamford is recognized for its business services and technology development, making it a suitable location for such research projects. This study by ISG aims to offer insights into the growing market for cloud data services, particularly those geared towards handling large amounts of data and supporting artificial intelligence applications. The findings from this study will provide valuable information for businesses looking to invest in cloud infrastructure to support their operations.

data.title: World Liberty Financial launches World Liberty Markets with USD1 utility, supporting WLFI, ETH, cbBTC, USDC, & USDT.
data.description: In New York, World Liberty Financial has introduced World Liberty Markets, a digital asset lending and borrowing protocol in partnership with Dolomite. This platform offers users the ability to lend and borrow assets, specifically supporting USD1, a stablecoin by WLFI. Users can also utilize other collateral assets such as WLFI, ETH, cbBTC, USDC, and USDT. World Liberty Markets is a significant advancement for USD1, as it provides diverse opportunities for lending and borrowing within the digital asset space.

data.title: Owkin collaborates with NVIDIA to enhance biological AI model OwkinZero, using Nemotron models and NeMo framework.
data.description: Tech company Owkin revealed a partnership with NVIDIA, aiming to bolster OwkinZero, their advanced biological reasoning model. Utilizing NVIDIA's cutting-edge AI computing resources such as the Nemotron models and NeMo framework, this collaboration seeks to enhance Owkin's biological reasoning capabilities. The alliance aims to boost performance, scalability, guardrails, and robustness of Owkin's model to expedite its advancement in the biological field. This collaboration marks a significant step towards unlocking the potential of AI in biological research.

data.title: Route acquires Frate Returns to enhance post-purchase experience for ecommerce brands with advanced returns technology.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Route, a post-purchase platform for top ecommerce brands, has revealed their acquisition of Frate Returns, a platform specializing in returns and exchanges for modern online retailers. This acquisition enhances Route's offerings by integrating Frate's advanced exchange-focused returns technology with Route's package protection and tracking services. The move strengthens Route's market position and benefits its customers with a complete solution.

data.title: Meghan Popoleo appointed as President of The O'Connor Group, focusing on business growth and employee engagement. Marcia O’Connor remains CEO.
data.description: In King of Prussia, Pennsylvania, The O'Connor Group, a top HR outsourcing and recruitment company, has named Meghan Popoleo as President. Popoleo is tasked with spearheading strategic efforts to drive business expansion and improve employee engagement and retention. Meanwhile, Marcia Zaruba O'Connor, the founder of The O’Connor Group in 2007, transitions to the role of CEO. In her new position, she concentrates on nurturing distinctive growth prospects for the company and broadening her influence within the community. Popoleo’s contributions have been instrumental in the company’s continuous success.

data.title: CCC Plugfest #16 for Digital Key testing hosted in Silicon Valley by Rivian and VW Group Tech, advancing interoperability.
data.description: In Beaverton, Oregon, CCC has commenced Plugfest #16 in Silicon Valley, hosted by Rivian and VW Group Tech. This event aims to enhance interoperability of Digital Key v4 among devices.

data.title: Senate probes UnitedHealth's Medicare Advantage diagnoses strategy, drawing scrutiny. UnitedHealth under investigation for aggressive tactics in boosting federal payments. Company facing criminal and civil requests, insists on compliance. Wall Street Journal highlights insurer's profit-driving tactics with costlier patient diagnoses. Probe ongoing, former employees cooperating with investigators.
data.description: A Senate Judiciary Committee investigation revealed that UnitedHealth Group Inc. aggressively collected diagnoses to increase federal payments under Medicare Advantage. The probe began over a year ago and is gaining traction as former employees cooperate with federal investigators. UnitedHealth claims to have started complying with formal criminal and civil requests from the Department. Medicare Advantage pays insurers fixed amounts to manage care for seniors and those with disabilities, with higher payments linked to costly medical conditions. UnitedHealth allegedly exploited this system to boost profits, straying from the program's intended purpose. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Judi Health's Capital Rx PBM now serves over 5 million contracted lives, with 1 million active as of Jan 1, 2026, plus 2 million new lives this year.
data.description: In New York, Judi Health, an enterprise health technology company and benefit administrator, reported significant growth this year. Their transparent pharmacy benefit manager (PBM), Capital Rx, has exceeded five million contracted employer lives overall, with over one million plan members active as of January 1, 2026. Furthermore, the company successfully onboarded two million new health plan lives in the current year. Judi Health's expansion in covered lives showcases their continued success in the industry.

data.title: GNC introduces new creatine lineup in 2026, following legacy products with three new muscle-building systems.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 12, 2026, GNC, a global frontrunner in health and wellness, revealed the release of an advanced creatine selection that enhances their renowned Pro Performance® Creatine Monohydrate and Beyond Raw Creatine HCl 189 products, along with the introduction of three innovative additions.

data.title: CarDonationPlace.com expands platform nationwide to simplify car donations, boost charitable impact.
data.description: CarDonationPlace.com, a national platform for car donations, has recently revealed plans for further growth of its online donation service. The aim is to streamline the vehicle donation process for individuals looking to support nonprofit organizations, and also boost the percentage of proceeds that are given back to these organizations.

data.title: AppYea appoints Ben Harris as CTO & Director; a blockchain trust infrastructure provider updates on technology.
data.description: In Jerusalem on January 12, 2026, AppYea, Inc. (OTCQB: APYP) disclosed the selection of Ben Harris as the new Chief Technology Officer (CTO) and addition to its Board of Directors. AppYea, a company offering blockchain-based trust infrastructure for regulated markets, made this announcement.

data.title: Celebree School to open in Milwaukee, Wisconsin in Oct 2027, focusing on children 6 weeks to 5 years old with play-based learning approach.
data.description: A new Celebree School is scheduled to launch in the Milwaukee area in October 2027, catering to children aged six weeks to five years old. The school focuses on innovative early education with a creative, play-based learning method. Their mission, "Grow People Big and Small™," emphasizes holistic growth for the young learners.

MAJOR BANKS SCALE BACK FED RATE-CUT EXPECTATIONS Following strong December jobs data, JPMorgan now sees no Fed rate cuts in 2026, keeping rates at 3.5–3.75% and even flagging a possible 2027 hike. Barclays has pushed projected cuts to June and December 2026. Markets price in a

data.title: Vontier Corp. recognized for sustainability, achieves 'A' in Climate Change & 'B' in Water Security ratings from CDP.
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - Vontier Corporation (NYSE: VNT), a prominent global provider of essential technologies for the mobility ecosystem, has earned a place on the 2025 CDP’s 'A List' for Climate Change. Additionally, the company received a 'B' rating for Water Security, highlighting its commitment to transparency and operational excellence. Vontier stands out as one of the few companies to secure an 'A' rating for Climate Change.

data.title: David Wood joins Hello Heart as General Counsel during a period of significant growth. Hello Heart is a digital heart health company based in Menlo Park, California.
data.description: A skilled legal professional has recently joined a digital heart health company based in Menlo Park, California, a move that comes at a time of substantial expansion for the company.

data.title: SolaREIT increases credit facility to $80 million with Atlantic Union Bank and EagleBank, demonstrating strong market confidence.
data.description: SolaREIT™, a prominent real estate investment firm specializing in solar and battery storage projects, has recently announced its fourth increase in land capacity within three years. This expansion signifies a significant surge in market trust and a favorable cost of land capital for developers in the storage and solar sector nationwide. The latest upsize is expected to benefit stakeholders across the country. The move reflects the company's continuous growth and its ability to provide competitive advantages to developers in the rapidly evolving renewable energy market.

data.title: Lennox to release Q4 and 2025 results on Jan 28, 2026. Company to announce FY 2026 guidance. #LII #EnergyEfficiency.
data.description: A company known for its energy-efficient climate control solutions, Lennox (NYSE: LII), based in Dallas, is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on January 28, 2026, before the market opens. Along with these results, they will also share their guidance for the fiscal year 2026. This update is eagerly awaited by investors as Lennox continues to be a key player in the industry.
